description: 聊天命令注册表 - 新增命令描述翻译

replacements.description: \"Manage session-level sett: description: "管理会话级设置（例如 /session idle）。"
replacements.description:\n \"Bind this thread:
description:
        "将此线程（Discord）或话题/对话（Telegram）绑定到会话目标。"
replacements.description: \"Remove the current thread: description: "移除当前线程（Discord）或话题/对话（Telegram）绑定。"
replacements.description: \"List thread-bound agents: description: "列出此会话的线程绑定代理。"
replacements.description: \"Export a JSONL trajectory: description: "为当前会话导出 JSONL 轨迹包。"
replacements.description: \"List model providers/mode: description: "列出模型提供商/模型或添加模型。"
